issues.sample: I AM FILING THIS COMPLAINT ABOUT MY 2015 CHEROKEE LATITUDE BECAUSE THE VEHICLE WAS REPEATEDLY SHIFTING ITSELF OUT OF DRIVE INTO NEUTRAL WHILE THE SUV WAS IN MOTION.  I HAD THE VEHICLE FOR 12 DAYS BEFORE THIS HAPPENED. I WAS COMPELLED TO FILE THIS COMPLAINT FOR TWO REASONS. FIRST,

AFTER USING THE AUTOMATIC REMOTE STARTER I GET IN THE VEHICLE AND PUT THE KEY IN THE IGNITION AND TURN IT TO THE "ON" SETTING.  I THEN DRIVE THE VEHICLE. A SOME POINT IN THE TRIP WHEN I COME TO A COMPLETE STOP THE ENGINE TURNS OFF AND THE EMERGENCY BRAKE IS AUTOMATICALLY ENGAGED.

I RECENTLY LEASED A NEW 2015 JEEP CHEROKEE WITH SAFETY PACKAGE AND FCW SYSTEM. WHEN I TOOK VEHICLE HOME I REALIZED THAT THE FORWARD COLLISION WARNING SYSTEM WAS NOT ENGAGING IE: NO AUDIBLE AND NO VISUAL ALERTS SO I TOOK IT BACK TO THE DEALER. THE VEHICLE HAS BEEN BACK TO SERVICE

WHILE BRAKING AT 24 MILES PER HOUR THE CAR ABRUPTLY DOWNSHIFTS AND CAUSES THE VEHICLE TO ACCELERATE. I HAVE NOTICED THE LONGER I DRIVE THE VEHICLE, IT WILL HAPPEN WHILE I AM SLOWING DOWN AT HIGHER SPEEDS AT WELL.    I HAVE TAKEN THE JEEP TO THE DEALERSHIP AND THEY HAVE FLASHED AN

narrative.headline: What 2015 Jeep Cherokee owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1,775 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (56% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
